'''nodhajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeesly|jeesly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeesly|jeesly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nodhajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhajithi|nodhajithi]] || [[word:nodhajiji|nodhajiji]] || [[word:nodhajishi|nodhajishi]] || [[word:nodhajiki|nodhajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhajuthuthu|nodhajuthuthu]] || [[word:nodhajujuju|nodhajujuju]] || [[word:nodhajushushu|nodhajushushu]] || [[word:nodhajukuku|nodhajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhajuthu|nodhajuthu]] || [[word:nodhajuju|nodhajuju]] || [[word:nodhajushu|nodhajushu]] || [[word:nodhajuku|nodhajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhajufthuf|nodhajufthuf]] || [[word:nodhajufjuf|nodhajufjuf]] || [[word:nodhajufshuf|nodhajufshuf]] || [[word:nodhajufkuf|nodhajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhajethe|nodhajethe]] || [[word:nodhajeje|nodhajeje]] || [[word:nodhajeshe|nodhajeshe]] || [[word:nodhajeke|nodhajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhajothotho|nodhajothotho]] || [[word:nodhajojojo|nodhajojojo]] || [[word:nodhajoshosho|nodhajoshosho]] || [[word:nodhajokoko|nodhajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhajotho|nodhajotho]] || [[word:nodhajojo|nodhajojo]] || [[word:nodhajosho|nodhajosho]] || [[word:nodhajoko|nodhajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhajofthof|nodhajofthof]] || [[word:nodhajofjof|nodhajofjof]] || [[word:nodhajofshof|nodhajofshof]] || [[word:nodhajofkof|nodhajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhajĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhajĂŠthĂŠ|nodhajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nodhajĂŠjĂŠ|nodhajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nodhajĂŠshĂŠ|nodhajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nodhajĂŠkĂŠ|nodhajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhajathatha|nodhajathatha]] || [[word:nodhajajaja|nodhajajaja]] || [[word:nodhajashasha|nodhajashasha]] || [[word:nodhajakaka|nodhajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhajatha|nodhajatha]] || [[word:nodhajaja|nodhajaja]] || [[word:nodhajasha|nodhajasha]] || [[word:nodhajaka|nodhajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhajafthaf|nodhajafthaf]] || [[word:nodhajafjaf|nodhajafjaf]] || [[word:nodhajafshaf|nodhajafshaf]] || [[word:nodhajafkaf|nodhajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nodhajasha|nodhajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodhajshĂ«asha|nodhajshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodhajroasha|nodhajroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodhajmuasha|nodhajmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodhajyaasha|nodhajyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodhajnkshĂ«asha|gonodhajnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodhajnkroasha|gonodhajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodhajnkmuasha|gonodhajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodhajnkyaasha|gonodhajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nodhadhajasha|nodhadhajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodhadhajshĂ«asha|nodhadhajshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodhadhajroasha|nodhadhajroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodhadhajmuasha|nodhadhajmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodhadhajyaasha|nodhadhajyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodhadhajnkshĂ«asha|gonodhadhajnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodhadhajnkroasha|gonodhadhajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodhadhajnkmuasha|gonodhadhajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodhadhajnkyaasha|gonodhadhajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nedhĂŠjasha|nedhĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nedhĂŠjshĂ«asha|nedhĂŠjshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nedhĂŠjroasha|nedhĂŠjroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nedhĂŠjmuasha|nedhĂŠjmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nedhĂŠjyaasha|nedhĂŠjyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠjnkshĂ«asha|gonedhĂŠjnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠjnkroasha|gonedhĂŠjnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠjnkmuasha|gonedhĂŠjnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠjnkyaasha|gonedhĂŠjnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nodhfajasha|nodhfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodhfajshĂ«asha|nodhfajshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodhfajroasha|nodhfajroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodhfajmuasha|nodhfajmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodhfajyaasha|nodhfajyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodhfajnkshĂ«asha|gonodhfajnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodhfajnkroasha|gonodhfajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodhfajnkmuasha|gonodhfajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodhfajnkyaasha|gonodhfajnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
